carryForwards.summary: Live pharmacy directory and dispatch-provider approval are not claimed by local proof.
carryForwards.boundedScope: external partner approval before live dispatch or NHS App exposure

carryForwards.summary: Live Update Record observation and referral-transport certification remain external controls.
carryForwards.boundedScope: certification before live GP workflow observation or production transport

carryForwards.summary: Manual assistive technology testing and physical device-lab assessment must augment Playwright proof before NHS App limited release.
SCAL, clinical-safety case, hazard log, and CSO sign-off are required before NHS App launch.
carryForwards.boundedScope: NHS App product assessment and launch

carryForwards.summary: NHS App incident rehearsal, implementation plan, limited-release cohort, and post-live reporting remain future launch controls.
carryForwards.boundedScope: NHS App Sandpit AOS limited-release path

carryForwards.summary: Live rollback and kill-switch rehearsal must complete before widened production release.
